title: senecio octophyllus
intro: Senecio octophyllus, also known as the Eight-Leaf Senecio, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio octophyllus include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Senecio octophyllus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves, flowers, or roots of the plant.
